description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot wrists; Price 500 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These scarred and worn armbands have clearly seen rough use, and are constructed out of coarse leather and fastened with thick leather straps. They grant their wearer a +1 competence bonus on grapple checks and checks to break a grapple. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, bullâs strength; Cost 250 gp.
